The Stepfather (2009)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $29,062,561Details
International Box Office $165,000
Worldwide Box Office $29,227,561
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $12,558,265
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $635,424
Total $13,193,689
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$11,581,586 (39.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.51 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:99.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,734 opening theaters/2,734 max. theaters, 3.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $46,345,096

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 16th, 2009 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
Video Release: February 9th, 2010 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for intense sequences of violence, disturbing images, mature thematic material and brief sensuality
Running Time: 101 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Epilogue, Prologue, Remake
Plot point: Coma, False Identity, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Serial Killer
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Screen Gems, Maverick Films, Granada Productions, Imprint Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
